secondary_channels.Titan: immense load-bearing body mass and ground pressure

silhouettes: broken processional arch fused through shoulders
units.survival_psychology: He steals allied wounds because suffering is the only proof his failed miracle still needs him.
units.villain_read: coercive martyr who makes allies indebted to his pain
units.supernatural_cost: redirected wounds calcify as stone blooms and goldless stigmata while sensation collapses
units.body_lane: huge bowed middle-aged once-human masculine penitent

secondary_channels.Bulwark: compressed square buttresses and locking joints

units.survival_psychology: She seals every injury behind another layer until protection becomes imprisonment.
units.villain_read: possessive protector that treats allies as contents
units.supernatural_cost: each hardening fuses a joint and deadens a sensory slit

secondary_channels.Arcanist: measured diagram cuts and one controlled ledger casting line

units.survival_psychology: She prices uncertainty so that people and spells can be owned.
units.supernatural_cost: paid kills erase memories and print them as tax-script through fingers and throat

secondary_channels.Cartel: repeated cut marks and closed-angle posture

units.survival_psychology: They become whatever a room rewards before anyone can decide what they are.
units.supernatural_cost: each theft chemically mismatches skin, fur, voice, and limb temperature

secondary_channels.Sanguine: clotted bowstring, predatory apertures, and blood-for-arrows exchange

units.survival_psychology: She hoards possible futures as ammunition rather than admit the unchosen lives are dead.
units.primary_prop: asymmetrical time-bow grown from spine and wing finger
units.supernatural_cost: each extra arrow ages one side of her face and drains blood into older scars

secondary_channels.Executioner: matte scythe-ribbon anatomy and collapsing arc

units.survival_psychology: It removes every trace that could let a group claim or reject it, then hunts the weakest witness.
units.primary_prop: broken ring of matte scythe-ribbons grown from spine
units.supernatural_cost: each chain execution erases facial contour and identity marks

units.survival_psychology: He makes every relationship transactional before affection can become leverage.
units.primary_prop: one receipt-branding iron used as cane
units.supernatural_cost: marks add paired eyelid scars and shorten depth perception

secondary_channels.Overload: frayed nerves and crowded script at head and hands

silhouettes: arthritic teacher fused to lectern brace
narrow body beneath crooked grading arm
units.survival_psychology: She keeps pupils dependent because being surpassed would invalidate her sacrifices.
units.supernatural_cost: forced recasts burn lessons into exposed nerves and make speech leak annotations

secondary_channels.Cartel: stamped ownership scars and closed triangular stance

units.survival_psychology: He makes every humiliation simple enough to solve in three blows.
units.primary_prop: one wage-stamp prosthetic fist with three plates
units.supernatural_cost: each punch embosses debt coin reliefs into bone and reduces finger motion

secondary_channels.Kaleidoscope: muted separated refractor panels in garment and face

silhouettes: wide robe with empty horizontal channel
units.survival_psychology: She makes herself indispensable between enemies and controls what each side may perceive.
units.primary_prop: none; split refractor train connecting forearms to heels
units.supernatural_cost: beams fracture facial expressions into incompatible eye colors and ages

secondary_channels.Fortified: interlocked skin masonry and rib buttresses

silhouettes: flesh keep with central pinning arm
units.survival_psychology: He makes other bodies pay the maintenance cost of his impossible continuity.
units.villain_read: panicked entitlement inside a siege body
units.supernatural_cost: healing steals tissue from embedded debtors while a flesh clock tightens

secondary_channels.Scholar: proof-strips laminated along weapon and sleeve

units.survival_psychology: They turn every grievance into evidence and every person into a target that can confirm it.
units.supernatural_cost: shots erase words from memory and burn citation scars across the aiming eye
